title: telis subracemosa
intro: Telis subracemosa, also known as Wild Cucumber or Tendrilled Telis, is a climber plant belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to offer several health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory problems, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Telis subracemosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application to enhance its therapeutic effects.
